description: NetRecon Cloudflare WAF custom rules for the netreconapp.com zone.

rules.name: Block SQL Injection Attempts
rules.description: Blocks requests containing common SQL injection patterns in URI, query string, headers, and body.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "UNION SELECT" or http.request.uri.query contains "' OR 1=1" or http.request.uri.query contains "DROP TABLE" or http.request.uri.query contains "--" or http.request.body.raw contains "UNION SELECT" or http.request.body.raw contains "' OR 1=1")

rules.name: API Rate Limit — Global
rules.description: Limits all API endpoints to 1000 requests per minute per client IP to prevent abuse.

rules.name: Login Rate Limit — Brute Force Protection
rules.description: Limits login and authentication endpoints to 10 requests per minute per IP to prevent credential brute-forcing.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path matches "^/api/auth/login" or http.request.uri.path matches "^/api/auth/token" or http.request.uri.path matches "^/api/auth/2fa")

rules.name: Challenge Tor Exit Nodes
rules.description: Issues a managed challenge to requests originating from known Tor exit nodes.
rules.expression: (cf.threat_score ge 50 or ip.geoip.is_in_european_union eq false and cf.threat_score ge 30)

rules.name: Enforce HTTPS Redirect
rules.description: Redirects all plain HTTP requests to HTTPS to ensure transport encryption.

rules.name: Block Suspicious User Agents
rules.description: Blocks requests from known vulnerability scanners, scrapers, and suspicious automated tools.
rules.expression: (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap" or http.user_agent contains "nikto" or http.user_agent contains "nessus" or http.user_agent contains "masscan" or http.user_agent contains "zgrab" or http.user_agent contains "gobuster" or http.user_agent contains "dirbuster" or http.user_agent contains "nuclei" or http.user_agent contains "wpscan" or http.user_agent contains "python-requests" and http.request.uri.path matches "^/api/")

deployment_notes.required_plan: Pro or higher for advanced rate limiting
